content: Official shadcn documentation identifies the CLI package as shadcn, supports Tailwind v4 and React 19, and uses init plus add commands. Current CLI v4 defaults to Base UI, so CityMind must pass --base radix to honor its approved Radix/new-york contract. The official new-york-v4 registry shows the selected component set resolves to radix-ui, class-variance-authority, lucide-react plus sidebar registry dependencies; init also uses clsx, tailwind-merge, tw-animate-css, and the shadcn runtime CSS package. Prefer Alert over Sonner in Phase 1 to avoid adding sonner and next-themes.
